violations.text: The cold-hold unit located in the was not in good repair. (Ambient 60 degrees F.) No TCS foods observed in unit. Owner awaiting part. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025

Various foods were observed held at 44-69 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2025
Prep unit was not in good repair, ambient observed at 69F. Refrigerator was not in good repair, ambient observed at 49F. New Violation. Correct By: 06/19/2025

Thermometers are lacking in the prep station and refrigerator. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2024
